violations.text: The door to the outside, located in hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of dirty tray) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer shelving have an accumulation of frost buildup. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the dish racks have an accumulation of black and brown residue. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The floors in the kitchen area are constructed of partially painted concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat violation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2022
The ceiling in the ware-washing area is covered with wood panels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024
The floor in the mop sink area is in poor repair, observed hole with exposed concrete. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area (above ovens) is in poor repair, observed chipping paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
